name: SEC EDGAR Submissions
description: SEC EDGAR submissions API — public-domain index of all filings by a US registrant. Requires a descriptive User-Agent header (set via SEC_USER_AGENT env var).

name: SEC EDGAR XBRL Company Facts
description: SEC EDGAR XBRL Company Facts API — structured GAAP financial concepts (Revenues, OperatingIncomeLoss, etc.) per fiscal year. Public domain.

name: SEC EDGAR XBRL Segment Facts
description: SEC EDGAR XBRL segment-level facts — extracts per-segment revenue, operating income, and computed margins for carve-out analysis.

name: Google News RSS
description: Public RSS feed of Google News search results. No API key required, but Google blocks automated requests from many IPs (returns 403). Falls back to fixture data when blocked.

name: Yahoo Finance (yfinance)
description: Market data via the unofficial yfinance Python library (price, market cap, PE ratio, debt, margins, 52-week performance).

name: FRED (St Louis Fed)
description: Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED) — official US macroeconomic time series. Requires FRED_API_KEY environment variable.

name: UK Companies House
description: UK Companies House registry — official company records. Requires COMPANIES_HOUSE_API_KEY env var.

name: FileUpload
description: Client file uploads (CSV/XLSX) — used by CS3 (post-deal) and CS4 (working capital).

name: GDELT 2.0 DOC API
description: Global Database of Events, Language, and Tone — a planet-scale news monitoring service. Adapter not yet implemented.

name: Stooq EOD CSVs
description: Stooq end-of-day market data CSVs — free backup market data. Adapter not yet implemented.

name: GLEIF LEI
description: Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation — official LEI registry. Adapter not yet implemented.

name: OpenCorporates
description: OpenCorporates — global company database. Adapter not yet implemented.

name: World Bank Indicators
description: World Bank Indicators API — country-level macroeconomic indicators. Adapter not yet implemented.
